_comment: Crelis Trust Engine policy pack. Edit this file to change governance behaviour — no code changes needed. Each policy: 'conditions' are ANDed together; if all match, the policy fires. 'risk_floor' forces the final risk score AT LEAST this high. 'risk_ceiling' caps risk when this policy's decision wins. 'route_to' overrides the default route for its decision. Supported condition operators: message_contains_any, task_type_in, proposed_action_in, industry_in, amount_greater_than, amount_less_than, channel_in.

policies.description: Customer language signals legal or regulatory escalation — a human must take over immediately.
policies.reasoning: Customer mentioned legal action or regulatory involvement.

policies.description: Monetary amounts above the auto-approval threshold need a human sign-off.
policies.reasoning: Amount exceeds the automatic approval threshold.

policies.description: Bulk data exports are blocked outright in v0.1 — too much PII exposure risk.
policies.reasoning: Data export actions are blocked due to PII exposure risk.

policies.description: Wire transfers always require a human expert in the loop.
policies.reasoning: Wire transfers require human expert handling.

policies.description: Routine password resets are safe for full AI automation.
policies.reasoning: Password resets are routine, low-risk support actions.
